metadata.name: Default Setup Wizard
metadata.description: A minimal setup guide template with options for other community templates.

channels.name: 🧙-setup-wizard
channels.topic: Run commands here to deploy your server layout
channels.initialMessage:
🧙 **Welcome to the Setup Wizard!**

I have two professional templates ready for you. To install one, simply **copy and paste** the command below into this channel.

---

### 🏠 Option 1: Friends Group
*Best for small squads, gaming, and hanging out.*
`!setup frnd.json` 

### 💻 Option 2: Programming Club
*Best for coding, collaboration, and career growth.*
`!setup pc.json` 

---

⚠️ **Note:** Running these commands will automatically create new categories and channels. Make sure I have **Administrator** permissions to complete the process!
